CustomField.description: Negotiated top-up amount that lessor will contribute to the claim payout. This field effectively overrides the Contribution Balance Starting (Precise) field, which originally has a precision of six decimal places.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Negotiated top-up amount that lessor will contribute to the claim payout. This field effectively overrides the Contribution Balance Starting (Precise) field, which originally has a precision of six decimal places.
CustomField.label: Contribution Balance Starting
